Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 301 

PRE_ICL_DRUG_TYPE_TIER_09 were not applicable). For 2011 and later, there were only six tiers (i.e., 
variable called PRE_ICL_DRUG_TYPE_TIER_07 was not applicable after 2010). 

 This variable was only 3-characters wide in 2006. 

The CCW constructs the Plan Characteristics file from information submitted by Part D plan sponsors 
to CMS’s Health Plan Management System (HPMS).
